name: flux-pro
description: State-of-the-art image generation with top of the line prompt following, visual quality, image detail and output diversity.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

guidance.description: Controls the balance between adherence to the text prompt and image quality/diversity. Higher values make the output more closely match the prompt but may reduce overall image quality. Lower values allow for more creative freedom but might produce results less relevant to the prompt.
guidance.title: Guidance

height.description: Height of the generated image in text-to-image mode. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32). Note: Ignored in img2img and inpainting modes.
height.title: Height

image_prompt.description: Image to use with Flux Redux. This is used together with the text prompt to guide the generation towards the composition of the image_prompt. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
image_prompt.title: Image Prompt

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality. Not relevant for .png outputs
output_quality.title: Output Quality

prompt_upsampling.description: Automatically modify the prompt for more creative generation
prompt_upsampling.title: Prompt Upsampling

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 1 is most strict and 6 is most permissive
safety_tolerance.title: Safety Tolerance

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed

width.description: Width of the generated image in text-to-image mode. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32). Note: Ignored in img2img and inpainting modes.
width.title: Width
